abilities.shortEffect: Ensures success fleeing from wild battles.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon is always successful fleeing from wild battles, even if trapped by a move or ability.

abilities.shortEffect: Makes sleep pass twice as quickly.
abilities.effect:
This Pokémon's remaining sleep turn count falls by 2 rather than 1.

If this Pokémon's sleep counter is at 1, it will fall to 0 and then the Pokémon will wake up.
When this Pokémon is confused, it has twice its evasion.
